app.title: LittleSnitch for Linux
app.author: pluc
proposed_tests: Install LittleSnitch on a Linux VM and configure a rule
Observe the output when a packet is filtered
Compare performance with native Linux firewall
Test LittleSnitch with a custom packet flow
